steps.title: Write the bag count equation
steps.content:
If $x$ is the number of granola bags and $y$ is the number of pistachio bags, the total number of bags gives
$$x+y=160$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation
steps.content:
Each granola bag costs $8$ dollars and each pistachio bag costs $13$ dollars. The total revenue is $1{,}675$ dollars, so
$$8x+13y=1{,}675$$The system is these two equations together. The answer is C.
